rulings.Case Title: CALIXTO ROBLES ET AL VS. WALTER MOREANO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Dr. Frank Hsu
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 30, 2016 line 1. PLAINTIFF CALIXTO ROBLES' Motion To Disqualify Dr. Frank Hsu GRANTED. See Shadow Traffic v. Sup. Ct. (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1067 and Western Digital Corp. v. Sup. Ct. (1998) 60 Cal.App.4th 1471. The Court notes that Defendant's opposition is 5 court days late and Ex. D to Fields Declaration is not what it is claimed to be by Mr. Fields in paragraph 11 of his declaration. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Intervene On Behalf Of Saint Noodle 2nd Sf, Llc, Sued And Served As Fat Noodle 2nd Sf, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 30, 2016 line 2. OTHER UNITED STATES LIABILITY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Leave To Intervene On Behalf Of Saint Noodle 2nd Sf, Llc, Sued And Served As Fat Noodle 2nd Sf, Llc continued to January 31, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than January 13, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ANDRES SUAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Back Trial Date And Settlement Conference To Twenty Days After The Dismissal Reconsideration Is Finally Ajudicated, And To Have This Matter Heard At 9:30 Am Dec-30-16
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 30, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT ANN LEMBERG's Motion To Set Back Trial Date And Settlement Conference To Twenty Days After The Dismissal Reconsideration Is Finally Ajudicated, And To Have This Matter Heard At 9:30 Am Dec-30-16 DENIED. See CCP 1005, CRC 3.1112, CRC 3.1113, invalid proof of service; CCP 2015.5. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: BROADWELL, LLC VS. GUO JIAN ZHENG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered On December 8, 2016
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 30, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT GUO ZHENG's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered On December 8, 2016 OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005. No Order Shortening Time on file. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
